title: BAI President Sarma Addresses Monkey Incident at India Open
indian_angle: The President of Badminton Association of India (BAI) comments on an incident at a major Indian tournament.
summary: BAI President Himanta Biswa Sarma made a statement regarding the presence of monkeys during the India Open, questioning the concern.

title: BAI Issues Circular for Form-1 Issuance to Sportspersons
indian_angle: This circular directly affects Indian badminton players requiring Form-1 for various official purposes.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has released a circular detailing the procedure for the issuance of Form-1 for badminton sportspersons.

title: Sub-Junior National Ranking Tournament Dates Rescheduled for Jaipur and Patna
indian_angle: This announcement impacts numerous young Indian badminton players participating in key national ranking tournaments.
summary: The dates for the Yonex-Sunrise All India Sub-Junior National Ranking Badminton Tournaments in Jaipur (U-15 & U-17) and Patna (U-13) have been changed.

title: Indian Shuttlers Urged to Develop Independent Thinking on Court
indian_angle: This opinion piece directly discusses the development and self-reliance of Indian badminton players.
summary: An article suggests that Indian shuttlers need to improve their ability to adapt and win matches without constant guidance from a coach during play.

title: New 3x15 Scoring System to Debut in Indian Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This significant rule change will be implemented across all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships in India.
summary: The 3x15 scoring system will be introduced in all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships for U-13, U-15, and U-17 categories, starting in Ernakulam.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Reaches US Open Final, Finishes as Runner-Up
indian_angle: A prominent Indian shuttler, Kidambi Srikanth, made a strong run to the final of the US Open.
summary: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open before losing in the last step, securing a runner-up finish.
